sourcesContent:
const Data = [
    {
        id: 1,
        category: "education",
        icon: "icon-graduation",
        year: "2019 - 2023",
        title: "Bachelors of Science | Computer Science",
        desc: "Purdue University"
    },
    {
        id: 2,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "July 2023 - Present",
        title: "Lockheed Martin | Software Engineer",
        desc: `Worked on the Flight Software team for the Sustaining Lunar Development program under contract with Blue Origin, integrating a PostgreSQL database to manage 500+ commands and telemetry, streamlining external telemetry requests for seven subsystem teams, developing and validating 150 flight software requirements with stakeholders, and assessing reusable code to enhance business value.`
    },
    {
        id: 3,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "July 2022 - Augsut 2022",
        title: "Lockheed Martin | Software Engineer Intern",
        desc: `Developed and implemented an automated software configuration comparison tool adopted by internal and external teams, including Honeywell and NASA, improving accuracy from under 60% to 100% for Honeywell’s pipeline and resolving 30,000+ static code analysis issues to enhance readability and productivity.`
    },
    {
        id: 4,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "May 2021 - May 2022",
        title: "Cummins | Frontend Devloper Lead",
        desc: `Collaborated with Cummins stakeholders and Data Science students to visualize fail and fault code trends, enhancing power engine production efficiency, while leading the Frontend Team in task management, external communication, and developing API publishing and deployment infrastructure with ReactJS and NodeJS.`
    },
    {
        id: 5,
        category: "experience",
        icon: "icon-briefcase",
        year: "August 2020 - May 2021",
        title: "Ford | Student Data Science Consultant",
        desc: `Developed a modular annotation tool for labeling crowd-sourced data to train ML models and presented it to senior engineers, who recognized its potential for integration into internal Ford projects.`
    },
    {
        id: 6,
        category: "education",
        icon: "icon-graduation",
        year: "June 2023",
        title: "Google Foundations of User Experience (UX) Design",
        desc: `Google Coursera`
    },
];

export default Data;
